name: Edgar Battle
abstract: Edgar "Puddinghead" Battle (October 3, 1907 – February 6, 1977) was an American jazz multi-instrumentalist, composer, and arranger. He performed on trumpet, trombone, saxophone, and keyboard.

about_quotes.speaker: William Randolph "Cozy" Cole
about_quotes.evidence: Ben Webster was in the band, Edgar Battle, Clyde Hart, and we'd start playing shows. Blanche Calloway.
